hero.subtitle: We guide you from the first consultation to closing. No surprises, no language barriers, no detours.

about.title: Kohan & Campos
about.subtitle: We are not a real estate agency
about.body: We help investors identify clear and secure opportunities in Paraguay.
about.f1_l1: We invest only where it makes sense.
about.f1_l3: Your capital focused on what matters.
about.f2_l1: We show only options relevant to you.
about.f2_l2: We filter out what doesn't fit your profile.
about.f3_l1: We connect local and international investors.
about.f3_l2: Access to projects from Paraguay with global vision.

specialties.title: Investment types
specialties.c1_desc: Enter early at pre-sale pricing. The project is built, you capture appreciation. At completion: sell or rent. You capture the margin, not the developer.
specialties.c2_desc: The investment that is already working when you buy it. Rent from day 1, tenant already validated, immediate cash flow.

value.title: What we deliver
value.i1: Objective analysis of each opportunity before any recommendation
value.i2: Access to pre-construction purchases and resales with real, verifiable returns
value.i3: Time savings: we filter the market noise for you
value.i5: Support from evaluation through closing and beyond

why.title: Why Paraguay?
why.subtitle: The market that still has real upside.
why.r4: Entry prices that no longer exist in Buenos Aires, Montevideo or Miami
why.r5: Real estate market with genuine appreciation potential

process.title: How we work
process.s1_desc: We learn your investor profile: capital, timeline, risk appetite and objective.
process.s2_desc: We analyze the market and pre-select with financial criteria. What doesn't pass the filter isn't presented.
process.s3_desc: Clear comparative analysis: entry price, estimated return, exit conditions.
process.s4_desc: We support you through closing. The relationship doesn't end at signing.

contact.title: Ready to invest with criteria?
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.success: ✓ Inquiry sent. We'll contact you within 24 hours.
contact.popup_subtitle: We've sent you a confirmation email. We will contact you within 24 hours.
contact.error: There was an error. Please write to us directly.
contact.privacy: Your information is confidential. We never share data with third parties.
